visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a young woman with long black hair, wearing a white fuzzy jacket over a dark top. She is standing inside a warehouse-style retail environment, identifiable as Costco by the large overlay logo at the top. She holds two transparent plastic bags containing food products: peanuts in shells and dark brown chestnuts. A graphic of an orange megaphone with the text '新品!' appears on the left. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of the two product bags. The left bag is labeled '蒸花生 STEAMED PEANUT' and contains light-colored peanuts. The right bag is labeled '帶殼熟栗子 STEAMED CHESTNUT INSHELL' and contains dark chestnuts. The background consists of yellow cardboard boxes stacked on shelves. (3) Returning to a medium shot, the woman talks to the camera, gesturing with the bags and pointing to the details on the labels. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail store. Yellow boxes with Chinese text are visible behind her. (4) The scene cuts to a close-up of the price tags on the store shelves. The first tag displays '$ 175' for 500g/2 packs of Steamed Peanuts. The second tag displays '$ 269' for 1kg/2 packs of Steamed Chestnuts. The background shows the metal shelving of the warehouse.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 新品!. [Subtitle]: 我發現最近好事多. (2) [Subtitle]: 很多玉美的東西. (3) [Subtitle]: 他有生花生 熟栗子. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後他們都是要冷藏的. (5) [Subtitle]: 但我自己覺得這個東西就是外面. (6) [Subtitle]: 現蒸熱熱那種最好. (7) [Subtitle]: 啊對. (8) [Subtitle]: 就有點那種台灣小吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 我可能如果有. (10) [Subtitle]: 要做料理或是準備年貨嘛. (11) [Subtitle]: I don't know 已經過完年了. (12) [Subtitle]: 存在就有他的道理. (13) [Subtitle]: 如果你想在佳麗自己蒸熱吃. (14) [Subtitle]: 但必須說他的品相是很漂亮的. (15) [Subtitle]: 他的就是很漂亮. (16) [Subtitle]: 還幫你真空包裝就保存的很好了. (17) [Subtitle]: 價格也還蠻不錯的. (18) [Subtitle]: 花生是500克有兩袋175元. (19) [Subtitle]: 熟栗子是一公斤兩袋269元.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight black hair, wearing a white sherpa-style fuzzy jacket over a gray turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring metal shelving units and stacks of yellow and brown cardboard boxes labeled with brand names and product info.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched 'Ding' or pop sound as a graphic appears, immediately followed by an upbeat electronic dance music track with a bright synth melody and a steady 124 BPM beat. A female voice speaks with a friendly, energetic tone. (2) As the speaker moves, a clear 'rustle' of plastic bags is heard, integrated with her continuous speech. The background music remains constant in volume and tempo. (3) A digital 'whoosh' sound effect occurs during a visual cut, marking a transition in the narration. A second female voice briefly laughs or adds a short comment, indicating an off-camera companion. (4) The main speaker continues to detail prices, her intonation rising on numerical values for emphasis. The background music maintains its energetic drive without pauses until the end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To introduce and review new steamed peanut and chestnut snack products found at Costco, highlighting their packaging quality and cost-effectiveness for viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on specific products from a brand (玉美) available at Costco, presenting them in a positive light with price information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media shopping recommendation video using standard editing tropes like on-screen captions and upbeat BGM.
